name: mini-jira-daily-digest
description: EventBridge daily digest Lambda for Mini-Jira tasks due today.

scripts.zip: powershell -NoProfile -Command "if (Test-Path mini-jira-daily-digest.zip) { Remove-Item mini-jira-daily-digest.zip -Force }; Compress-Archive -Path index.js,package.json,package-lock.json,node_modules -DestinationPath mini-jira-daily-digest.zip -Force"
